Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT up.upgrade, count(*) AS change FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS up JOIN comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs ON bs.bldg_id = up.bldg_id AND bs.county = up.county AND bs.state = up.state AND bs.upgrade = 0 WHERE bs.applicability = true AND up.applicability = true AND up.upgrade != 0 AND coalesce(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh", -1) < 0.001 AND coalesce(bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - up."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh", -1) < 0.001 AND coalesce(bs."out.other_fuel.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - up."out.other_fuel.total.energy_consumption..kwh", -1) < 0.001 AND coalesce(bs."out.district_cooling.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - up."out.district_cooling.total.energy_consumption..kwh", -1) < 0.001 AND coalesce(bs."out.district_heating.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - up."out.district_heating.total.energy_consumption..kwh", -1) < 0.001 AND NOT (coalesce(abs(up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh"), 0) < 0.001 AND coalesce(abs(up."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh"), 0) < 0.001 AND coalesce(abs(up."out.other_fuel.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - bs."out.other_fuel.total.energy_consumption..kwh"), 0) < 0.001 AND coalesce(abs(up."out.district_cooling.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - bs."out.district_cooling.total.energy_consumption..kwh"), 0) < 0.001 AND coalesce(abs(up."out.district_heating.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - bs."out.district_heating.total.energy_consumption..kwh"), 0) < 0.001) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/9ea8cd4e3f955aa7834d3691e167d4cece6b531204ee9f007bfae33d11c499ee/cad73908-1a86-4368-b45e-c5801a628f71/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
